data.title: Bird-X Unveils Two Game-Changing Handheld Lasers That Send Pest Birds Fleeing on Sight
data.description: Bird-X, Inc., a prominent manufacturer of professional bird control solutions in the United States, has introduced the HH-100 and HH-400 Class 3B Platforms, offering instant and long-range bird dispersal capabilities. The company has also initiated certification programs for LST and LSO concurrently. This announcement was made on April 29, 2026, in Chicago. The HH-100 and HH-400 platforms are designed to efficiently address bird-related issues and are poised to make a significant impact in the market.

data.title: Twenty One Capital Outlines Operating Plans to Build the Bitcoin Company
data.description: Twenty One Capital, Inc. (“Twenty One”), a Bitcoin-focused firm based in Austin, Texas, revealed its plan to acquire Strike, a top Bitcoin financial services company, and Elektron, a global Bitcoin mining platform. By consolidating these entities, Twenty One aims to integrate Bitcoin treasury, mining, financial services, and capital markets. This move is part of their strategic approach that involves mergers and acquisitions to enhance their operations within the Bitcoin sector.

data.title: National E&S Leaders Convene as U.S. Market Surpasses $100 Billion Amid Rising Risk Complexity
data.description: Today in Anaheim, over 100 leaders in regulatory, legal, and industry sectors of the U.S. surplus lines market came together for the Surplus Lines Law Group meeting hosted by the Surplus Line Association of California. This gathering attracted a diverse group of professionals collaborating on various aspects of the market, showcasing the importance of such events in facilitating discussions and networking opportunities within the industry.

data.title: SPX Cooling Tech Unveils the Marley® OlympusMAX™ Fluid Cooler
data.description: SPX Cooling Tech, LLC unveiled the Marley® OlympusMAX™ Fluid Cooler in Overland Park, Kansas on April 29, 2026. This cutting-edge cooler offers maximum capacity and trusted performance for critical facilities. It ensures unmatched efficiency and design flexibility, setting new standards in cooling technology.

data.title: Google and Microsoft exceed Q1 estimates, Google Cloud up 63% and Microsoft AI hits $37 billion run rate.
data.description: Both Alphabet and Microsoft exceeded Q1 expectations in impressive quarterly earnings reports. Google Cloud witnessed a remarkable 63% increase, while Microsoft's AI business achieved a staggering $37 billion run rate.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Set More Record Highs; Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Alphabet Are Big Winners
data.description: Stock market futures for the Dow Jones showed positive trends on Monday as both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 reached new record highs. Companies such as Micron, Sandisk, Nvidia, and Alphabet were notable gainers. The success of these companies contributed to the overall positive performance of the market, with investors showing optimism for future growth. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 indexes in particular saw significant gains, reflecting the strong performance of the tech and semiconductor sectors. Investors closely monitored the progress of these companies, with many seeing potential for further growth in the near future.

data.title: RealOpen and TRON confirm $9.4 million in USDT for crypto real estate deals in joint Holiday Campaign. #RealEstate #CryptoTransaction
data.description: RealOpen, a prominent platform for purchasing real estate using cryptocurrency, recently revealed the successful completion of its joint "Fast Moves, Fast Payments" Holiday Campaign with TRON.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips But Nasdaq, Nvidia Gain; Microsoft Up After This OpenAI Deal (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Monday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline. Parent company Alphabet of Google made its debut on the stock market today. Microsoft saw an increase following a recent agreement with OpenAI. The Nasdaq and Nvidia both saw gains as well. This update provides a snapshot of today's stock market, with the Dow Jones dipping but Nasdaq and Nvidia making gains, while Microsoft rises after a deal with OpenAI.

data.title: Cohen & Steers Total Return Realty Fund, Inc. (RFI) Notification of Sources of Distribution Under Section 19(a)
data.description: On April 29, 2026, a recent announcement was made for the shareholders of Cohen & Steers Total Return Realty Fund, Inc. (NYSE: RFI). The communication details the origins of the upcoming distribution scheduled for April 30, 2026, along with the cumulative distributions disbursed in the fiscal year. This communication aims to inform shareholders of the Fund about the distribution payment and provide them with an overview of the total distributions made during the fiscal period.

data.title: FilmUSA Expands Footprint at Marché du Film with New Riviera Village Pavilion, Doubled Interior Space, and Waterfront Terrace
data.description: The increasing presence of FilmUSA at Cannes 2026 showcases its growing significance in representing the U.S. screen economy on a global scale. Headquartered in Cannes, France, on April 29, 2026, FilmUSA, the prominent national trade association, stood as the advocate for over 120 U.S. film commissions. This highlights the organization's vital role in furthering the U.S. film industry's interests on the international market stage.
